title: ItemBan
description: 1.7.10 mod that allows you to 'ban' items via the configuration. Banned items will have their recipes removed, delete from player inventories and delete when dropped.
body:
1.7.10 mod that allows you to 'ban' items via the configuration. 
Banned items will have their recipes removed, delete from player inventories and delete when dropped.

Works both serverside and in singleplayer, and does not require clients to have it installed when on the server.

Supports item sub-ids! For example, you can ban red wool by entering minecraft:wool:14.
See the generated configuration file for more details (itemban.cfg)
